# services.matrix-appservice-irc

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.matrix-appservice-irc`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Matrix/IRC bridge. |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.localpart` | `string` | The user_id localpart to assign to the appservice |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.needBindingCap` | `boolean` | Whether the daemon needs to bind to ports below 1024 (e.g. for the ident service) |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.passwordEncryptionKeyLength` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Length of the key to encrypt IRC passwords with |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port to listen on |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.registrationUrl` | `string` | The URL where the application service is listening for homeserver requests, from the Matrix homeserver perspective. |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Configuration for the appservice, see <https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-appservice-irc/blob/4.0.0/config.sample.yaml> for supported values |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings.database` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Configuration for the database |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings.database.connectionString` | `string` | The database connection string |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings.database.engine` | `string` | Which database engine to use |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings.homeserver` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Homeserver configuration |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings.homeserver.domain` | `string` | The 'domain' part for user IDs on this home server. Usually (but not always) is the "domain name" part of the homeserver URL. |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings.homeserver.url` | `string` | The URL to the home server for client-server API calls |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings.ircService` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | IRC bridge configuration |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings.ircService.mediaProxy.bindPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port that the media proxy binds to. |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings.ircService.mediaProxy.publicUrl` | `string` | URL under which the media proxy is publicly acccessible. |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings.ircService.mediaProxy.signingKeyPath` | `absolute path` | Path to the signing key file for authenticated media. |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings.ircService.mediaProxy.ttlSeconds` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Lifetime in seconds, that generated URLs stay valid. Set the lifetime to 0 to prevent URLs from becoming invalid. |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings.ircService.passwordEncryptionKeyPath` | `string` | Location of the key with which IRC passwords are encrypted for storage. Will be generated on first run if not present. |
| `services.matrix-appservice-irc.settings.ircService.servers` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | IRC servers to connect to |
